dateOfBirth.description: Date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format

districtCode.description: code identifying the district within the province

communeCode.description: code identifying the commune within the district

villageCode.description: code identifying the commune within the district

placeOfBirth.description: Place of birth with hierarchical location names

mobileNumber.description: Student's mobile number with international country code or local format

previousClass.description: Previous class in format 'Grade XY' where X is grade number and Y is optional section

districtCode.description: code identifying the district within the province

communeCode.description: code identifying the commune within the district

villageCode.description: code identifying the commune within the district

currentResidence.description: Current residence with hierarchical location names

previousSchoolIdExists.description: Verifies previousSchoolId exists in the School registry
previousSchoolIdExists.errMessage: Previous school with the specified ID does not exist in registry

validAge.description: Ensures student age is between 5 and 25 years based on dateOfBirth
validAge.errMessage: Invalid age: Student must be between 5 and 25 years old

provinceExistsForPlaceOfBirth.description: Verifies Province with specified code exists in registry
provinceExistsForPlaceOfBirth.errMessage: Province with the specified code in place of birth does not exist in registry

provinceExistsForCurrentResidence.description: Verifies province exists in the Province registry
provinceExistsForCurrentResidence.errMessage: Province with the specified code in current residence does not exist in registry

districtExistsForPlaceOfBirth.description: Verifies districtCode exists under the specified province
districtExistsForPlaceOfBirth.errMessage: District with the specified code in place of birth does not exist under the given province

districtExistsForCurrentResidence.description: Verifies districtCode exists under the specified province
districtExistsForCurrentResidence.errMessage: District with the specified code in current residence does not exist under the given province

communeExistsForPlaceOfBirth.description: Verifies communeCode exists under the specified district
communeExistsForPlaceOfBirth.errMessage: Commune with the specified code in place of birth does not exist under the given district

communeExistsForCurrentResidence.description: Verifies communeCode exists under the specified district
communeExistsForCurrentResidence.errMessage: Commune with the specified code in current residence does not exist under the given district

villageExistsForPlaceOfBirth.description: Verifies village exists in the Village registry
villageExistsForPlaceOfBirth.errMessage: Village with the specified code in place of birth does not exist in registry

villageExistsForCurrentResidence.description: Verifies village exists in the Village registry
villageExistsForCurrentResidence.errMessage: Village with the specified code in current residence does not exist in registry
